name: Retroactive Union Pay and COVID Benefit Repayment
description: Complete David Ross's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. David is a single transit operator in Ontario (born Jan 15, 1982) who received $24,000 in retroactive pay for 2021-2023 and repaid a $2,000 CERB overpayment. Using the tax documents located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\ross\ (including a T4 with Box 89, a retroactive pay breakdown letter, and a T4E), prepare the return. Ensure Form T1198 is completed for the qualifying retroactive lump-sum payment and the $2,000 benefit repayment is claimed as a deduction on Line 23200. Save the completed return as 'david_ross.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Form T1198 Statement of Qualifying Retroactive Lump-Sum Payment; CRA T4E instructions
metadata.key_complexity: Form T1198 for multi-year retroactive pay; T4 Box 89; T4E Box 30 current-year deduction
